Name: Vikram
Cast: Kamal Haasan, Fahadh Faasil, Vijay Sethupathi, Narain
Description: A special investigator uncovers a series of murders and discovers a sinister conspiracy far deeper than he imagined. Packed with intense action and unexpected twists.

Name: Jailer
Description: A retired jailer goes on a dangerous manhunt after his son is targeted by a powerful drug cartel. Superstar Rajinikanth delivers a power-packed performance.

Name: Leo
Cast: Vijay, Trisha, Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Sarja
Description: A mild-mannered cafe owner is forced to confront his dark past when a ruthless gang threatens his family. A gripping tale of identity and vengeance.

Name: KGF Chapter 2
Cast: Yash, Sanjay Dutt, Raveena Tandon, Srinidhi Shetty
Description: Rocky's reign over Kolar Gold Fields is challenged by Adheera, a ruthless adversary. The saga of power, ambition, and legacy continues in this blockbuster sequel.

Name: RRR
Cast: Jr NTR, Ram Charan, Alia Bhatt, Ajay Devgn
Description: A fictional tale of two legendary Indian revolutionaries, Alluri Sitarama Raju and Komaram Bheem, and their battle against the British Empire.

Name: Interstellar
Cast: Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway, Jessica Chastain, Michael Caine
Description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space to ensure humanity's survival. Christopher Nolan's magnum opus pushes the boundaries of science fiction.

Name: The Dark Knight
Cast: Christian Bale, Heath Ledger, Aaron Eckhart, Morgan Freeman
Description: Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice when the menacing Joker wreaks havoc on Gotham.

Name: Ponniyin Selvan
Cast: Vikram, Aishwarya Rai, Jayam Ravi, Karthi, Trisha
Description: An epic historical drama set in the Chola dynasty. A tale of palace intrigue, war, and loyalty unfolds in ancient South India.
